title: Cosmos Remix — Burst you can retune and reskin live
summary: Remixable particle radial burst / firework: particles shoot outward from centre along even angles, radius eased so they expand then loop and reset seamlessly with trails implied by size falloff. Live panel retunes palette / shape / density / speed / size plus a Rays knob; reskins to any brand colour in one click. Self-contained, zero-deps. ?auto=1 hides the panel and runs a deterministic seamless loop.
usage_notes: RUN: open index.html in any browser — particles continuously burst from the centre as a sparkle shower. PANEL: the glass control panel (top-right) retunes the field live — pick a Palette skin, a Shape (dot/ruby/atom/star/crystal/spark), and drag Density, Spread, Speed, Dot size, and the Rays slider (4–48 spokes); ↻ Seed cycles palette/spread and ⧉ Copy exports your tuned config to the clipboard. KEY TECHNIQUES: geometry — each particle rides one of P.rays even-angle spokes with a golden per-index stagger; its own looping phase ph drives a smoothstep-eased radius out to maxR, and sin(ph·π) fades it in and out so frame(0)===frame(LOOP); size shrinks along flight to imply trails. PARAMS convention — window.__params describes each knob and window.setParam(key,value) applies it, which the generic remix harness reads. Theme tokens — PALETTES holds accent + 3-colour ramp per brand skin; ramp(pal.cols, i/count) colours each particle. Shapes — drawShape() renders the six cheap additive shapes. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 hides panel + window.__seek(t). TUNE: raise Rays for a dense firework, drop it to a few wide jets; raise Density/Dot size if the field looks sparse, Speed sets the shower rate.
